    prefix_sum = 0

    var prefixSum = 0L

        remainderMap(currentRemainder) = math.max(existingValue, newValue)
        dp = newDp
    }

    totalSum - dp
}

def solve(nums: Array[Long], k: Long): Long = {
    import scala.collection.mutable
    val totalSum = nums.sum
    var prefixSum = 0L
    var dp = 0L
    val remainderMap = mutable.Map[Long, Long](0 -> 0)
    for (num <- nums) {
        prefixSum += num
        val currentRemainder = prefixSum % k
        val prevValue = remainderMap.get(currentRemainder).getOrElse(-Long.MaxValue)
        val possibleValue = prevValue + prefixSum
        val new_dp = math.max(dp, possibleValue)
        val newValue = new_dp - prefixSum
        val currentVal = remainderMap.getOrElse(currentRemainder, -Long.MaxValue)
        if (newValue > currentVal) {
            remainderMap(currentRemainder) = newValue
        }
        dp = new_dp
    }
    totalSum - dp
}

    prefix_sum = 0

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    total_sum = sum(nums)
    prefix_sum = 0
    dp = 0
    remainder_map = {0: 0}  # key: remainder, value: max (dp_j - prefix_j)
    
    for num in nums:
        prefix_sum += num
        current_remainder = prefix_sum % k
        # Compute possible value using the current remainder
        possible_value = remainder_map.get(current_remainder, -float('inf')) + prefix_sum
        new_dp = max(dp, possible_value)
        
        # Update the remainder_map with the current remainder and new_dp - prefix_sum
        if current_remainder in remainder_map:
            if (new_dp - prefix_sum) > remainder_map[current_remainder]:
                remainder_map[current_remainder] = new_dp - prefix_sum
        else:
            remainder_map[current_remainder] = new_dp - prefix_sum
        
        dp = new_dp
    
    return total_sum - dp

    total_sum = sum(nums)

        # update remainder_map

        else:

            remainder_map[current_remainder] = new_dp - prefix_sum

        dp = new_dp

    return total_sum - dp

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    total_sum = sum(nums)
    prefix_sum = 0
    dp = 0
    remainder_map = {0: 0}  # key: remainder, value: max (dp_j - prefix_j)
    
    for num in nums:
        prefix_sum += num
        current_remainder = prefix_sum % k
        # Compute possible value using the current remainder
        possible_value = remainder_map.get(current_remainder, -float('inf')) + prefix_sum
        new_dp = max(dp, possible_value)
        
        # Update the remainder_map with the current remainder and new_dp - prefix_sum
        if current_remainder in remainder_map:
            if (new_dp - prefix_sum) > remainder_map[current_remainder]:
                remainder_map[current_remainder] = new_dp - prefix_sum
        else:
            remainder_map[current_remainder] = new_dp - prefix_sum
        
        dp = new_dp
    
    return total_sum - dp
